visual_description: A young boy with short brown hair, wearing a red and gray sweater, stands in a dim bedroom and reaches for the knob of a closed wooden door. He grasps the knob with his right hand and turns it, appearing to try to open the door. In the background, a bed with a sleeping person and a lit lamp are visible.
audio_description: There is little audible sound, with only a faint click when the knob is turned.
